headline: Bio-Techne Corp (NASDAQ:TECH) Passes the Caviar Cruise Screen with Flying Colors
summary: The Caviar Cruise stock screening strategy identifies quality companies with sustainable advantages. Bio-Techne Corp (TECH) passes with 25.48% ROIC, strong cash flow, and minimal debt, making it a compelling long-term investment candidate.
